description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a light wood platform frame with a tall, flat headboard. The bed is dressed with a fitted dark gray sheet that covers the mattress, and three white pillows are neatly arranged against the headboard. The frame is solid and boxy, with clean lines and no visible legs, giving it a contemporary, minimalist appearance. The wood grain is visible on the headboard and side panels, adding a natural texture to the design. The bed does not have a footboard, and the bedding is tucked in smoothly, emphasizing the sleek silhouette. The overall look is functional yet stylish, suitable for urban interiors or contemporary living spaces.
description: A modern platform bed with a light wood frame, tall headboard, dark gray sheet, and three white pillows. The design is minimalist and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall wooden headboard, three white pillows, and the dark gray sheet covering the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden frame, the depth of the mattress, and the arrangement of pillows against the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the plain wooden headboard with visible wood grain, no bedding or pillows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the bed, the headboard, and the bedding arrangement.
